creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As keohrednaV.miT@X2296 wrote:

> 9.  Read the message "Missing Name Server" and select "Ok".

Don't do this.  Fill in a nameserver value.  This was a known bug in
sysinstall that has been fixed since.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
